lanes.label: Product / requirements
lanes.reason: The UltraGoal needs explicit scope, non-goals, acceptance criteria, and user-visible completion criteria.

lanes.label: Architecture / implementation
lanes.reason: The work changes or creates executable behavior that needs a concrete implementation plan.

lanes.label: Testing / evidence
lanes.reason: Completion must be backed by mechanical checks or explicit runtime evidence.

lanes.label: Integration ownership
lanes.reason: Specialist feedback must be merged into one coherent implementation and final verdict.

swarmDecisionPolicy.engageWhen: More than one material lane, subjective quality, domain correctness, runtime evidence, or independent review is required.
swarmDecisionPolicy.deferWhen: Every required lane is safely owned by the main agent and single-agent execution is lower-risk.
